steps.t: Nye Crowfoot can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Nye Crowfoot.
Traps can be found in the Wildwood. You should check traps in the Wildwood.
Nye Crowfoot can be found in the wilds of the Wildwood. You should talk to Nye Crowfoot in the Wildwood.
Large game traps can be found in the Wildwood. You should bait the large game traps and let the live critters go back into the wilds.
Enid Nettlesting can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
